padding-inline.$description: dimension used by the alert component for padding inline.

padding-block.$description: dimension used by the alert component for padding block.

gap.$description: dimension used by the alert component for gap.

radius.$description: dimension used by the alert component for radius.

border-width.$description: dimension used by the alert component for border width.

font-size.$description: dimension used by the alert component for font size.

line-height.$description: dimension used by the alert component for line height.

heading-font-size.$description: dimension used by the alert component for heading font size.

heading-font-weight.$description: font weight used by the alert component for heading font weight.

dismiss-size.$description: dimension used by the alert component for dismiss size.

dismiss-icon-size.$description: dimension used by the alert component for dismiss icon size.

bg.$description: color used by the alert component for neutral background.

fg.$description: color used by the alert component for neutral foreground.

border.$description: color used by the alert component for neutral border.

bg.$description: color used by the alert component for success background.

fg.$description: color used by the alert component for success foreground.

border.$description: color used by the alert component for success border.

bg.$description: color used by the alert component for danger background.

fg.$description: color used by the alert component for danger foreground.

border.$description: color used by the alert component for danger border.

bg.$description: color used by the alert component for info background.

fg.$description: color used by the alert component for info foreground (MarsUI brief §1 systematic em pattern: tone high-em text on tone base-em surface, matching the success/danger rows and the ki-badge tone matrix; AA 7.3:1).

border.$description: color used by the alert component for info border.

bg.$description: color used by the alert component for warning background.

fg.$description: color used by the alert component for warning foreground (MarsUI brief §1 systematic em pattern: tone high-em text on tone base-em surface, matching the success/danger rows and the ki-badge tone matrix; AA 5.5:1).

border.$description: color used by the alert component for warning border.

fg.$description: color used by the alert component for dismiss rest foreground.
color used by the alert component for dismiss hover foreground.
color used by the alert component for dismiss active foreground.

color.$description: color used by the alert component for focus ring color.

width.$description: dimension used by the alert component for focus ring width.

offset.$description: dimension used by the alert component for focus ring offset.

shadow.$description: shadow used by the alert dismiss control for the focus ring glow (MarsUI Focus/primary: 3px spread ring at 40% — specs/002-ki-button/design-extraction.md §2.5, same double mechanism as ki-button: glow plus the opaque indicator).
